theme.name: Aural Anthem
theme.notes: B aeolian. Cinematic/ambient. Inspired by Faltermeyer's Top Gun Anthem bed — sustained synth pad + arpeggio (Logic/Juno-6V) + anthem melody. Guitar layered live at emotional peaks. 20-minute four-movement structure. Motif transforms map to movements: M1=inversion, M2=augmentation, M3=retrograde, M4=expand. Instruments: ARP 2600 V or Modular V3 pad, Mellotron V strings or Mini V melody, Juno-6V arpeggiator external via Logic.
